message:
WASM size optimization: 642KB → 10KB for pure functions

- Add needs_std flag to track print() usage
- Conditionally emit std import only when needed
- Conditionally emit runtime import only when async used
- Skip allocator setup for pure functions (no alloc needed)

Result: Simple add() function WASM went from 642KB to 10KB
(closer to claimed 46KB - may be even smaller with wasm-opt)
